title: Complete discovery journey through cinematic navigation and homepage sections
description: Verifies a visitor can move from the homepage through cinematic navigation to overview and attractions and return while core homepage sections remain reachable.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the global navigation menu
Click the link to view the overview page
Open the global navigation menu
Click the link to return to the homepage
Scroll to the homepage districts section
Open the global navigation menu
Click the link to view the attractions page
Verify the attractions page main content is displayed

title: Navigate from homepage to overview using global menu
description: Verifies a visitor can open the cinematic navigation from the homepage and reach the overview page successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the hamburger menu icon to open the navigation
Click the navigation link to the overview section
Verify the overview page content is displayed

title: Submit availability inquiry successfully
description: Verifies a prospective sponsor or lessee can complete the availability form and see a persistent acknowledgement UI after submission.

steps.description: Navigate to /sponsorships
Scroll to the Claim Your Place availability section
Fill a company name into the company name field
Select a valid option from the requirement dropdown
Fill valid contact details into the contact fields
Submit the form
Verify a submission acknowledgement or confirmation UI is displayed

title: Navigate across all top-level routes via global navigation
description: Verifies a user can use the global navigation to reach each public route without getting stuck.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the global navigation menu
Click the link to view the overview page
Open the global navigation menu
Click the link to view the attractions page
Open the global navigation menu
Click the link to view the events page
Open the global navigation menu
Click the link to view the retail page
Open the global navigation menu
Click the link to view the sponsorships page
Verify the sponsorships page main content is displayed

title: Close global navigation after opening it
description: Verifies a visitor can dismiss the cinematic navigation after opening it and return to the underlying page view.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the hamburger menu icon to open the navigation
Close the navigation
Verify the navigation overlay is not displayed

title: Availability form shows required-field validation then allows successful resubmission
description: Verifies the availability form blocks submission with missing required fields, shows client-side validation errors, and succeeds after correcting inputs.

steps.description: Navigate to /sponsorships
Scroll to the Claim Your Place availability section
Submit the form
Verify client-side validation errors for required fields are displayed
Fill a company name into the company name field
Select a valid option from the requirement dropdown
Fill valid contact details into the contact fields
Submit the form
Verify a submission acknowledgement or confirmation UI is displayed

title: Secondary CTA navigates to retail
description: Verifies a visitor can use the secondary hero call-to-action to reach the retail page successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the secondary call-to-action
Verify the retail page content is displayed

title: Mobile-first navigation between key sections without layout breakage
description: Verifies a mobile user can navigate between homepage, events, and retail using the hamburger navigation and the homepage layout remains usable.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Resize the viewport to a mobile width
Open the global navigation menu
Click the link to view the events page
Open the global navigation menu
Click the link to view the retail page
Open the global navigation menu
Click the link to return to the homepage
Scroll to the homepage statistics section
Verify the statistics content is displayed in a mobile-friendly single-column layout

title: View events listings for planning
description: Users can open the Events page and see event-related directory or venue listing content rendered on the page.

steps.description: Navigate to /events
Wait for the page content to finish loading
Verify events page content is displayed
Verify an events or venues listing is displayed

title: View retail directory for shopping discovery
description: Users can open the Retail page and see retail directory content and shopping information rendered on the page.

steps.description: Navigate to /retail
Wait for the page content to finish loading
Verify retail page content is displayed
Verify a retail directory or listings section is displayed

title: Homepage hero renders with headline and background media
description: Verifies the homepage hero section loads and presents its key content elements without missing media or layout breakage.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the hero section is displayed with a prominent headline and background imagery

title: Scroll progress indicator remains visible and tracks scroll on homepage
description: Verifies that scrolling the homepage shows a fixed progress indicator that updates as the user scrolls.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll down the page
Verify a fixed scroll progress indicator is visible above the page content
Scroll near the bottom of the page
Verify the scroll progress indicator reflects the current scroll position

title: Plan a visit using homepage secondary CTA then browse retail and events
description: Verifies a planner can follow the homepage secondary CTA to retail and then move to events while both pages render their directory/listing content.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the secondary call-to-action in the hero
Verify the retail page main content is displayed
Open the global navigation menu
Click the link to view the events page
Verify events listings or directory content is displayed

title: Plan by navigating from Retail to Events and confirming both pages render
description: Users can move from Retail to Events through in-app navigation and see listings render correctly on both pages.

steps.description: Navigate to /retail
Click the site navigation control to open the global navigation menu
Click the navigation option for Events
Wait for the page content to finish loading
Verify events page content is displayed
Verify an events or venues listing is displayed

title: Homepage scroll progress indicator tracks scroll without obscuring content
description: Verifies the homepage scroll progress indicator remains visible and updates as the user scrolls down the page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to roughly the middle of the homepage
Scroll to near the bottom of the homepage
Verify the scroll progress indicator remains visible and shows progress near completion

title: Close global navigation by clicking outside
description: Verifies the global navigation can be dismissed by clicking outside the menu so content remains accessible.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the global navigation menu
Click outside the navigation menu
Verify the navigation menu is closed

title: Return from Events to Retail and confirm directory still renders
description: Users can move from Events to Retail through in-app navigation and still see the retail directory rendered correctly.

steps.description: Navigate to /events
Click the site navigation control to open the global navigation menu
Click the navigation option for Retail
Wait for the page content to finish loading
Verify retail page content is displayed
Verify a retail directory or listings section is displayed

title: Homepage statistics section displays four key stats
description: Verifies that the statistics section on the homepage renders four primary statistics for users scanning mall metrics.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the statistics section
Verify four primary statistics are displayed

title: Primary CTA shows active interaction on press
description: Verifies the primary call-to-action provides a visible pressed/active interaction when engaged.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Press and hold on the primary call-to-action
Verify the primary call-to-action shows an active pressed interaction

title: Scroll progress indicator remains fixed without overlapping key sections
description: Verifies that the fixed progress indicator stays pinned while scrolling through major homepage sections without obscuring content.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the statistics section
Scroll to The Vision section
Scroll back upward toward the top of the page
Verify the scroll progress indicator remains fixed at the top and does not cover primary content

title: District cards render responsively as three-up on desktop
description: Verifies the Districts section shows three district cards in a side-by-side layout on a desktop viewport.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Resize the viewport to a desktop width
Scroll to the homepage districts section
Verify three district cards are visible and presented in a multi-column layout

title: Primary hero call-to-action responds to hover interaction
description: Verifies the primary hero call-to-action provides a visible hover interaction to indicate interactivity.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Move the pointer over the primary call-to-action
Verify the primary call-to-action shows a hover interaction

title: Statistics grid adapts to single-column layout on mobile viewport
description: Verifies that on a mobile-width viewport the statistics section displays in a single-column layout for readability.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Set viewport to a mobile width
Scroll to the statistics section
Verify the statistics are arranged in a single-column layout

title: Footer collapses into a single-column layout on mobile viewport
description: Verifies the footer adapts to mobile by collapsing into a single-column layout so links remain usable on small screens.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Resize the viewport to a mobile width
Scroll to the bottom of the page
Verify the footer content is arranged in a single-column layout suitable for mobile

title: Secondary CTA hover interaction is visible
description: Verifies the secondary call-to-action provides a visible hover interaction to indicate it is actionable.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Move the pointer over the secondary call-to-action
Verify the secondary call-to-action shows a hover interaction

title: Deep-link to Events and Retail routes without blank or broken states
description: Users can directly load the Events and Retail routes and each page renders its main content without showing an empty or broken state.

steps.description: Navigate to /events
Wait for the page content to finish loading
Navigate to /retail
Wait for the page content to finish loading
Verify retail page content is displayed
Verify a retail directory or listings section is displayed

title: The Vision section renders grayscale image and supporting content
description: Verifies that The Vision section is discoverable on scroll and displays the architectural image with accompanying copy.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to The Vision section
Verify a grayscale architectural image and supporting content are displayed

title: Footer links are present and respond to hover interaction
description: Verifies users can discover footer navigation links and see a hover interaction indicating they are interactive.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the bottom of the page
Hover a footer category link
Verify the hovered footer link shows a visual hover state

title: Close global navigation with Escape key when open
description: Verifies the global navigation can be dismissed via keyboard to support quick exit and accessibility.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the global navigation menu
Press Escape
Verify the navigation menu is closed

title: The Vision image reveals color on hover interaction
description: Verifies that hovering the architectural image in The Vision section triggers the intended interactive transition.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to The Vision section
Hover over the architectural image
Verify the image transitions from grayscale to color with a subtle scale change

title: District card hover emphasizes the hovered card
description: Verifies hovering a district card increases its visual emphasis to help users identify the active district.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the homepage districts section
Hover over a district card
Verify the hovered district card becomes visually emphasized compared to its normal state
